transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 gang1 seot1 pou4 jyut6

trans.div: Gengxu May of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: hián khó Ông kong Tik Tshing îng
hin2 haau2 wong4/wong6 gung1 dak1 ceng1/cing1 jing4
xiǎn kǎo wáng gōng dé qīng yíng

trans.div: Examine the tombs of princes and princes

f.f86: [{id:'1',text:[{id:'t1',topicFocus:'topic',role:'loc',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:'f'},transcription:'穎川',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'ínn tshuan',cantonese:'wing6 cyun1',pinyin:'yǐng chuān'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'date',properties:{writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'民國戊子瓜月',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'Bîn-kok bōo tsú kue gua̍t',cantonese:'man4 gwok3 mou6 zi2 gwaa1 jyut6',pinyin:'mín guó wù zi guā yuè'},translation},{id:'t1',topicFocus:'focus',role:'person',properties:{dateMeaning:'',calendar:'',decade:'',era:'',writingDirection:'t2br2l',side:''},transcription:'陳家祖先之佳城',transliteration:{pehOeJi:'tîn ka tsóo-sian tsi kha Siânn',cantonese:'can4:zan6 gaa1:gu1 zou2 sin1 zi1 gaai1 seng4:sing4',pinyin:'chén jiā zǔ xiān zhī jiā chéng'},translation}]}]

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 mou6 zi2 gwaa1 jyut6
mín guó wù zi guā yuè

trans.div: Wuzi Guayue in the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: tîn ka tsóo-sian tsi kha Siânn
can4/zan6 gaa1/gu1 zou2 sin1 zi1 gaai1 seng4/sing4
chén jiā zǔ xiān zhī jiā chéng

trans.div: The great city of the Chen family’s ancestors

transliterations.transliteration: 乙 亥 liân tuann gua̍t siu
jyut3/jyut6 hoi6 nin4 dyun1 jyut6 sau1
yǐ hài nián duān yuè xiū

trans.div: Repair at the end of the lunar month of Yihai year

transliterations.transliteration: tsóo khó 柯 hú kun Hing tsi bōng
zou2 haau2 o1 fu2 gwan1 hing1/hing3 zi1 mou6
zǔ kǎo kē fǔ jūn xìng zhī mù

trans.div: Tomb of Junxing in Zu Kaoke Mansion

names.name: carving an expression of political loyalty

text.transcription: 民國七五年農六月廿三日

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok tshit ngóo Liân lông lio̍k gue̍h jia̍p/lia̍p sann ji̍t
man4 gwok3 cat1 ng5 nin4 nung4 luk6 jyut6 jaa6/je6/nim6 saam1/saam3 jat6
mínguó qī wǔ nián nóng liù yuè niàn sān rì
Tshuà Ông mn̂g Lîm bué/Kíng kha îng
coi3 wong4/wong6 mun4 lam4 mei5 gaai1 jing4
cài wáng mén lín měi jiā yíng

text.transcription: 民國丙寅年十一月十三日

transliterations.transliteration: Bîn-kok píng 寅 liân tsa̍p tsi̍t gue̍h tsa̍p sann li̍t
man4 gwok3 bing2 jan4 nin4 sap6 jat1 jyut6 sap6 saam1/saam3 jat6
mínguó bǐng yín nián shí yī yuè shí sān rì

trans.div: November 13, Bingyin Year of the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Kòo lí pó Hok tsi kha îng
gu3 lei5 bou2 fuk1 zi1 gaai1 jing4
gù lǐ bǎo fú zhī jiā yíng

trans.div: Therefore, the tomb of Li Baofu

transliterations.transliteration: man4 gwok3 bing2 ng5 gwai3 jyut6

trans.div: Bingwu Guiyue in the Republic of China

transliterations.transliteration: Ông mn̂g 劉 tshîng tsi kha 茔
wong4/wong6 mun4 lau4 cung4 zi1 gaai1 jing4
wáng mén liú sōng zhī jiā yíng

trans.div: The tomb of Liu Song of Wangmen
